SEARCH
Package com.orasaka.core.pipeline

Interface OrasakaToolRegistry

public interface OrasakaToolRegistry
Registry interface for local Java methods to be used as tools by the AI models.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<org.springframework.ai.tool.ToolCallback>
    getRegisteredTools()
    Retrieves all registered tool callbacks.
    boolean
    isRagIngestionEnabled()
    Checks if RAG ingestion is enabled for any tool.
    <I, O> void
    registerTool(String name, String description, Class<I> inputType, Function<I,O> function)
    Registers a local Java method as a tool.
    void
    triggerIngestion()
    Triggers the RAG ingestion pipeline.

  • Method Details

    • registerTool

      <I, O> void registerTool(String name, String description, Class<I> inputType, Function<I,O> function)
      Registers a local Java method as a tool.
      Type Parameters:
      I - Input type.
      O - Output type.
      Parameters:
      name - Name of the function.
      description - Description of what the function does.
      inputType - Input class.
      function - The actual implementation.

    • getRegisteredTools

      List<org.springframework.ai.tool.ToolCallback> getRegisteredTools()
      Retrieves all registered tool callbacks.
      Returns:
      A list of ToolCallback objects.

    • isRagIngestionEnabled

      boolean isRagIngestionEnabled()
      Checks if RAG ingestion is enabled for any tool.
      Returns:
      True if RAG ingestion is enabled, false otherwise.

    • triggerIngestion

      void triggerIngestion()
      Triggers the RAG ingestion pipeline.
